frontend/src/components/paths/PathDetailPopup.tsx — progress group ai_RNbBHYJn, DS-02 wrapper bTItq/bTIuq, pct ai_RNbBHYJs, last-step ai_RNbBHYJt

functional_audit.check: View Path on grid card opens PathDetailPopup bound to enrollment row data
Enroll CTA persists enrollment via pathenrollment1 insert or profiles.onboarding_data fallback
Unenroll CTA updates enrollment status and dismisses popup
Upgrade Plan button visible under tier gating and navigates to subscription route

ui_evidence.notes: IR nests badges ai_RNbBHYJS and title ai_RNbBHYJZ under header-text group ai_RNbBHYJR; implementation flattens both as direct children of ai_RNbBHYJQ
Steps label/text rendered inside anonymous Group_transparent_ div; IR parent is path-detail-steps-group ai_RNbBHYJg
IR nests bTItq and pct ai_RNbBHYJs under progress-bar-wrap ai_RNbBHYJp; implementation attaches bTItq directly under ai_RNbBHYJn
Style entity applied via DialogOverlay; no bubble id expected
Applied on enroll and upgrade buttons via data-style-ref + bubbleStyle

gaps.finding: Three decompose ui_refs (ai_RNbBHYJR, ai_RNbBHYJg, ai_RNbBHYJp) lack data-bubble-id wrappers; IR parent_element_id chain is flattened one level in header, steps, and progress regions

critiques.finding: Header, steps, and progress sub-trees omit intermediate IR group markers (ai_RNbBHYJR, ai_RNbBHYJg, ai_RNbBHYJp), weakening automated parity checks even though leaf AC markers are present
critiques.alternative: Add wrapper divs with the missing data-bubble-id values to mirror inventory parent_element_id nesting without changing visible layout

critiques.finding: enrollInPath and unenrollFromPath failures are only console.error'd; user receives no inline toast or banner when Supabase mutation fails
critiques.alternative: Surface a dismissible error state in the popup footer or reuse an existing toast pattern from dashboard mutations

critiques.finding: Steps text ai_RNbBHYJi concatenates all sessions into one paragraph; IR text_expressions suggest per-path dynamic copy that may render as separate lines in Bubble
critiques.alternative: Render sessions as a vertical list or line-broken block if visual parity testing shows mismatch
